message:
fix(font): resolve clippy warnings and improve Hash correctness in font subsystem

Apply idiomatic Rust patterns across 12 font crate files: or_default(),
assign-ops (*=), unsigned_abs() for safe abs-to-usize, collapsible if
blocks, lifetime elision, and derive(Default) where new() exists.

Replace the derived Hash on FontDataSource with a manual impl that
hashes discriminant+name instead of raw byte data, fixing potential
hash inconsistency between identical fonts loaded from different paths.
Mark ColorLine::new_from_hb as unsafe since it dereferences raw pointers.

Remove redundant .to_string() in format! args, single-char push_str
to push, unnecessary casts, unreachable returns, and unused imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
